heading: Definitions
label: 6301 Definitions
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective and Termination Dates of 2012 Amendment note under , Highways.Oct. 1, 2012section 3(a) of Pub. L. 112–141section 101 of Title 23

Construction, , , provided that:Pub. L. 112–141, div. E, title II, § 52011(b)126 Stat. 895July 6, 2012“If the provisions of , United States Code, are transferred to chapter 63 of that title, the following rules of construction apply:section 111 of title 49“(1)For purposes of determining whether 1 provision of law supersedes another based on enactment later in time, a chapter 63 provision is deemed to have been enacted on the date of enactment of the corresponding section 111 provision [ was enacted ].section 111 of this titleDec. 18, 1991“(2)A reference to a section 111 provision, including a reference in a regulation, order, or other law, is deemed to refer to the corresponding chapter 63 provision.“(3)A regulation, order, or other administrative action in effect under a section 111 provision continues in effect under the corresponding chapter 63 provision.“(4)An action taken or an offense committed under a section 111 provision is deemed to have been taken or committed under the corresponding chapter 63 provision.”

E, title II, § 52011(b)126 Stat. 895July 6, 2012“If the provisions of , United States Code, are transferred to chapter 63 of that title, the following rules of construction apply:section 111 of title 49“(1)For purposes of determining whether 1 provision of law supersedes another based on enactment later in time, a chapter 63 provision is deemed to have been enacted on the date of enactment of the corresponding section 111 provision [ was enacted ].section 111 of this titleDec. 18, 1991“(2)A reference to a section 111 provision, including a reference in a regulation, order, or other law, is deemed to refer to the corresponding chapter 63 provision.“(3)A regulation, order, or other administrative action in effect under a section 111 provision continues in effect under the corresponding chapter 63 provision.“(4)An action taken or an offense committed under a section 111 provision is deemed to have been taken or committed under the corresponding chapter 63 provision.”

children.heading: .—Bureau
children.label: 1 .—Bureau
children.text: The term “Bureau” means the Bureau of Transportation Statistics established by section 6302(a).

children.heading: .—Department
children.label: 2 .—Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Transportation.

children.heading: .—Director
children.label: 3 .—Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the Bureau.

children.heading: .—Library
children.label: 4 .—Library
children.text: The term “Library” means the National Transportation Library established by section 6304(a).

children.heading: .—Secretary
children.label: 5 .—Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Transportation.
